description_long: This is a modern three-seater sofa featuring a sturdy wooden frame with open rectangular armrests and a slatted wooden base. The seat and backrest are upholstered in a vibrant blue fabric, complemented by three loose green square back cushions and two cylindrical pink bolster pillows placed at each end. The armrests are wide and flat, constructed from light-colored wood, providing a strong visual contrast to the colorful cushions. The back of the sofa is fully enclosed with a wooden panel, giving it a solid and finished appearance from all sides. The overall design is clean and geometric, with a focus on comfort and bold color blocking, making it suitable for urban parks, public lounges, or outdoor seating areas. The sofa's cushions appear plush and inviting, while the wooden structure ensures durability and stability.
description: A modern wooden-framed sofa with blue upholstery, three green back cushions, and two pink bolster pillows, featuring open rectangular armrests and a solid wooden back panel. The design is bold, colorful, and well-suited for urban outdoor or public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing three green back cushions, blue seat cushions, and two pink bolster pillows on a wooden frame with open armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the blue cushions, the placement of the green and pink pillows, and the open rectangular wooden armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid wooden back panel and the full width of the wooden frame, with no cushions visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the arrangement of cushions and the structure of the wooden armrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three loose green square back cushions and three blue seat cushions, with two pink cylindrical bolster pillows at each end; all cushions appear uniform in size and unattached.
attribute_armrest_style: Present, wide and flat rectangular wooden armrests at each end, extending above the seat height, with an open box-like profile and no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are integrated into the wooden frame, forming block-style supports at each corner and along the sides, with a continuous slatted wooden base; legs are exposed and have a natural wood finish.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with blue upholstery and three loose green cushions; no tufting or decorative detailing visible.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue fabric upholstery with a subtle woven texture; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
